description: A Budget Analyst at a Global Office Supplies distributor needs to replace four inefficient SQL queries with a single Oracle View to improve dashboard performance. Create a view named REVENUE_SUMMARY_VIEW in the HR schema that aggregates the SALES_TRANSACTIONS table, replacing the logic found in /home/ga/Desktop/inefficient_query.sql. The view must calculate revenue sums for (Region, Category), (Region), (Category), and Grand Total in a single pass using grouping sets. The view must contain exactly three columns: REPORT_REGION (VARCHAR2), REPORT_CATEGORY (VARCHAR2), and TOTAL_REVENUE (NUMBER), where NULL values are replaced with 'All Regions' and 'All Categories' respectively. Ensure the output is sorted by REPORT_REGION then REPORT_CATEGORY. Connection: host=localhost, port=1521, database=XEPDB1, username=hr, password=hr123.
